title: サイレンススズカ、覚醒③

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unprecedented fervor sweeps the Tokyo
Racecourse as Grass Wonder, El Condor Pasa,
and Silence Suzuka all gather for a single race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle once again joins Reporter Etsuko
Otonashi as a spectator.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the crowd eagerly looks on, Silence Suzuka
instantly breaks away from the pack, picking up
even more speed on the final stretch to claim
victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her unique style of running captivates the hearts
of those who witness it.
